user.title: HA Health Check
user.description: Configure the health check endpoint for Kubernetes probes.

data_description.auth_required: If enabled, the /healthz endpoint requires a Home Assistant long-lived access token.
data_description.threshold: Number of seconds without a keepalive before reporting unhealthy. Minimum: 10.
data_description.keepalive_interval: How often to fire the internal keepalive event (seconds). Minimum: 5.

abort.already_configured: HA Health Check is already configured.

error.threshold_too_low: Threshold must be greater than keepalive interval to avoid false unhealthy reports.
